title: Unvalidated User Input
description: The system’s description lacks details on how user input is handled. Without proper validation and sanitization, attackers could inject malicious code (SQL injection, XSS) or manipulate data, leading to data corruption, unauthorized modifications, or system compromise.  This is exacerbated by the lack of information on data classification.
attack_vector: SQL Injection, Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), Command Injection, Malicious File Uploads.
mitigations: Implement strict input validation and sanitization for all user-supplied data.
Use parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Employ a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to filter malicious requests.
